offer: For fleet operations directors managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient tracking of fuel consumption causes increased operational costs. We automate weekly fuel consumption reports instead of manual tracking and reporting of fuel consumption.
problem: inefficient tracking of fuel consumption leading to increased operational costs
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet operations directors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to fleet operations directors with demo video
Participate in community forums for fleet management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of fuel data and weekly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
